title: Delhi High Court rejects plea for shifting jailed former PFI chief Abubacker to private hospital
description: The Delhi High Court recently rejected a plea by jailed former Popular Front of India (PFI) chief Abubacker, who had requested that he be shifted from jail to a private hospital for better medical treatment [Abubacker E vs National Investigation Agency And Anr.].Abubacker, who is lodged in Tihar jail on terror funding allegations, claimed that he was not getting adequate treatment from the government hospitals currently treating him for various medical ailments.In a judgment passed on March 28,
